author: averrie
name: NorMuon + PhaseResid + CosineWD + Backout + LoRA TTT
blurb: Extends the baseline train_gpt.py with 8 training improvements (NorMuon, phase-transition resid_mix, cosine WD, backout, RoPE 50K, softcap 20, momentum cooldown, cautious WD) and 6 architecture upgrades (10 layers, 3x MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, SWA, orthogonal init). Eval: causal LoRA TTT + sliding window. Compression: int5-MLP/int6-attn, magnitude pruning 5%, zstd-22.
